shortForecast: Chance Snow Showers then Scattered Rain Showers
name: Today
detailedForecast: A chance of snow showers before 10am, then scattered rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 46. North wind 3 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
